steps.title: Find attendance at first and second sessions
steps.content:
72% of the 1,250 first-session attendees also attended the second session:
$$0.72 \times 1250 = 900$$
So 900 people attended both sessions.

steps.title: Calculate attendance at all three sessions
steps.content:
36% of the 900 people who attended both the first and second sessions also attended the third session:
$$0.36 \times 900 = 324$$
Therefore, 324 people attended all three information sessions.
